canonical_sources.name: California Building Standards Commission - Codes
canonical_sources.why_it_matters: Primary index for current Title 24 parts, errata, and supplements.
canonical_sources.notes: Use to discover current CBC, CRC, and related parts; the page lists 2025, 2022, 2019, 2016 editions and update links.

canonical_sources.name: California Building Standards Commission main resources
canonical_sources.why_it_matters: Contains Title 24 access, guidebooks, and resource links.

core_code_targets.name: ICC Digital Codes public access
core_code_targets.notes: Useful for reading and section lookup; may not provide clean bulk PDFs.

archive_targets.name: Title 24, Part 2, Volume 1, 2007 California Building Code
Title 24, Part 2, Volume 2, 2007 California Building Code
Title 24, Part 02.1, 2019 California Building Code, Vol. 1

local_amendment_targets.name: Contra Costa County Ordinance No. 2025-19
local_amendment_targets.why_it_matters: Explicitly adopts and amends the 2025 California Building Standards Code with county-specific changes.
notable_amendment_topics: smoke detection in existing flat-roof buildings when pitched roofs are added
enhanced concrete inspection and design requirements
fire-treated wood shakes/shingles for exterior wall coverings

local_amendment_targets.name: San Diego County building code amendments
local_amendment_targets.notes: Useful as a pattern for local amendment language and codified ordinance structure.

local_amendment_targets.name: County-specific local amendments throughout California
local_amendment_targets.notes: Use DGS codes page plus county ordinance searches to find adopted local amendments and supplements.

order: 1. DGS codes index for current CBC/CRC links.
2. Internet Archive items for prior editions and downloadable scans.
3. County ordinances / staff reports for amendments.
4. ICC public access for section-level cross-checking.

reject: login required to access full text
image-only with no OCR if avoidable

search_patterns: "adopts and amends" "California Building Standards Code" county
"building code" "Health and Safety Code sections 17958.5" county
